Notes: Freshman guard Whitney Coleman scores 16 points and junior forward Kristi
Baranowski has a game-high 19 rebounds to lead RPI to a 76-62 win over
Hood College in 3rd-place game of Diversified Invitational; Danielle Gallagher
leads Hood College with game-high 21 points
Game.Officials: Holly Johnson,  Chris Johnston,  Ed Smith
